_comment: P60 drop-folder dispatch table (data, not code): content_category -> handler atom + target store. Read by the inbox-routing atom and tools/handoff/inbox.py. category_source says who can assign the category: 'format' = the offline classifier alone is enough (unambiguous from the file itself); 'content' = a Claude session must read the extraction (ingest-route) before this category is trusted, so the offline scan lists such files as needs_review rather than guessing. Every handler is proposal-only; nothing routes without human approval. Add or change rules only with the matching SKILL/maintainer/scenario updates (see skills/atoms/inbox-routing/MAINTAINER_README.md).

moodboard.note: reference asset; kept with the content it inspires, no store write
